steps.title: Read the yearly multiplier
steps.content: The exponent is $\frac{x}{12}$, so after $12$ months the exponent increases by $1$. That means the yearly multiplier is $0.27$.

steps.title: Convert retained value to loss
steps.content:
A multiplier of $0.27$ means the machine keeps $27\%$ of its value each year. The percent decrease is
$$100\%-27\%=73\%$$The answer is D.
